languages.text: "Хочешь сказать он выдумывает цитаты находу, присваивая их несуществующим мудрецам?"
"You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"
languages.original_text: "Хочешь сказать он выдумывает цитаты находу, присваивая их несуществующим мудрецам?"

traits.locale_text: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"
"You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"
"You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"

languages.text: «¿Me está diciendo que se inventa frases intelectuales y atribuye su autoría a sabios ficticios?».
languages.original_text: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Me está diciendo que se inventa frases intelectuales y atribuye su autoría a sabios ficticios?».

languages.text: “你的意思是，他引用的那些话都是现编的，还安在那些子虚乌有的贤者头上？”
languages.original_text: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"

traits.locale_text: “你的意思是，他引用的那些话都是现编的，还安在那些子虚乌有的贤者头上？”

languages.text: « Vous dites qu'il invente des citations et les attribue à des sages fictifs ? »
languages.original_text: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous dites qu'il invente des citations et les attribue à des sages fictifs ? »

languages.text: "Kafadan sözler uydurup bunları kurgusal âlimlere atfettiğini mi söylüyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"

traits.locale_text: "Kafadan sözler uydurup bunları kurgusal âlimlere atfettiğini mi söylüyorsun?"

languages.text: 「つまり彼は、その場で引用句をでっち上げて、架空の賢者の言葉だと偽っているというのか？」
languages.original_text: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"

traits.locale_text: 「つまり彼は、その場で引用句をでっち上げて、架空の賢者の言葉だと偽っているというのか？」

languages.text: "Ihr meint, er denkt sich Zitate einfach aus und schreibt sie fiktiven Weisen zu?"
languages.original_text: "You mean he makes up quotes off the top of his head, ascribing them to fictitious sages?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr meint, er denkt sich Zitate einfach aus und schreibt sie fiktiven Weisen zu?"
